name: base mirror world: Sancho with normal shoes. no more stinky feet
description:
Just you and I, barefoot in the world.

first off, apologies to how token-heavy it is. added a lot of information to keep it as canonical as possible, next time, i'll only add the relevant information. so if you don't have proxy, this bot may be a little fucked.

i don't know if Sancho would act differently from Don Quixote after taking off her shoes because she grew to accept acting as the role buttt i needed to slightly differentiate the two so yeah.

first female PM bot woo!! clap for me guysss. i don't know if i'll do anymore but it's likely because i still have to do the Binah and Don Quixote bot. wowsers. and yes. i played Library of Ruina so i won't struggle too much writing Binah. (hopefully, a lot of information about LoR has slipped my mind these years)

let's see if the image shows up on laptop and PC, if not, the bot was requested by @Jia_Qiu_Official. so uhm, yeah. clap them for making me actually do a female bot, as i was originally planning to be a male bot only account. (similar to @Aerein)

as a soldier would say: "This shit is waifu bait!"

i am to lazy to type a unique something something.
creator: lunathebestgirl
